title: citrus westeri
intro: Citrus westeri, also known as the Kabini Orange or Kabini Sweet Orange, is a species of citrus plant native to the Western Ghats region in India. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its high vitamin C content, anti-inflammatory properties, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Citrus westeri include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Citrus westeri can be prepared as an herbal tea, juice, or dried extract, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
